subject: [PATCH 3/7 v3] mm/page_counter: introduce stock drain APIs

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch introduces two new APIs, page_counter_drain_stock_local() and page_counter_drain_stock_cpu(), to replace existing memcg stock draining functions. The local version takes a lock to serialize against concurrent charges, while the CPU version does not take a lock as it will only be called from the CPU hotplug path where no more charges can occur. These new APIs are designed to drain the stock of a page counter in a thread-safe manner.
